briefdescription.para: The terminal to display on.
The update settings.
The buffer to render to the terminal.
The last terminal size.
The minimum size for the UI display (starts cropping)
The hard minimum size for the UI display (no display, warning)
The earliest next time the terminal size is tested.
The stack with all pages.
The terminal size has changed.
The earliest next time a render is triggered.
The display theme.
Create a new display instance.

parameterdescription.para: The main page to show initially.

briefdescription.para: Create a new display instance with explicit size limits.

parameterdescription.para: The main page to show initially.
The size limits for this display.

briefdescription.para: Create a new display instance with an explicit theme scope.

parameterdescription.para: The main page to show initially.

memberdef.argsstring: (TerminalPtr terminal, PagePtr mainPage, theme::ThemeConstPtr theme, SizeLimits sizeLimits)
memberdef.name: Display

briefdescription.para: Create a new display instance with an explicit theme scope and size limits.

parameterdescription.para: The main page to show initially.
The size limits for this display.

briefdescription.para: Push a new page to the page stack.

parameterdescription.para: If you push more than 20 pages or a duplicate page to the stack.

briefdescription.para: Pop the top page from the page stack.

parameterdescription.para: If you try to pop the main page from the stack.

briefdescription.para: Poll for terminal size changes.
Poll for render work.

detaileddescription.para: This triggers a render for visible dirty pages as soon as the minimum render interval allows it.

briefdescription.para: Get the earliest next wake-up time required by the display.
Forward a key press to the active page.

parameterdescription.para: The key press event to forward.

briefdescription.para: Replace the display theme.

parameterdescription.para: The new theme. A null pointer restores the default dark theme.

briefdescription.para: Set the minimum display size for the application.

detaileddescription.para: If the terminal size is smaller, the display is cropped and crop marks indicate to increase the terminal size.

briefdescription.para: Set the hard minimum display size for the application.

detaileddescription.para: If the terminal size is smaller than this hard limit, no UI is displayed - just a warning.

briefdescription.para: Test if any currently visible page needs a render pass.

simplesect.para: true if a visible page needs layout or paint.

briefdescription.para: Calculate the layout of all displayed pages.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SurfacePtr &surface, const LayoutProposal &proposal, const LayoutContext &context) noexcept
memberdef.name: measureSurface

briefdescription.para: Measure one surface with the given proposal.
Layout a visible surface and then continue through its visible children.
Render the current page to the terminal.
Render all visible pages from the nearest opaque base page upward.
Collect visible paint requests from a page.
Add a paint request while coalescing covered requests.
Paint one request into the display buffer.
Paint a surface and all intersecting child surfaces.
Paint later siblings of a surface on the path back to the page.
Paint one surface into the display buffer.
Test if a visible surface in a tree requires layout or paint work.
Create the resolved theme context for one surface.
Refresh the effective terminal size after terminal or display-size limit changes.
A display is a way to show pages on a terminal.
